name: Fresh Peach Cobbler
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Fresh peeled, sliced peaches (about 6 medium peaches)
1/3 cup Enriched Corn Meal (Aunt Jemima or Quaker)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, combine peaches, brown sugar, cornstarch, lemon juice, and cinnamon. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
2. Boil and stir for 1 minute.
3. Pour the mixture into a 1-1/2 quart casserole dish.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F.
5. In a separate bowl, combine dry ingredients: all-purpose flour, enriched corn meal, granulated sugar, baking powder, and salt (if using).
6. Cut in margarine until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
7. Add milk and beaten egg, mixing just until the dry ingredients are moistened.
8. Drop scant 1/4 cupfuls of the batter over the hot filling.
9. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until the topping is light golden brown.
10. Serve warm.
